narrative:
Cranberry Twp (precinct in Crawford County) has 1,009 registered voters, with 54.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 38.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 7.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 30.4 percentage points.
